hooks.command: terminal-notifier -title 'Claude Code' -message 'Task complete — ready for input' -sound default 2>/dev/null || true
~/playground/keyboard/bin/dygma cancel-section underglow 2>/dev/null; ~/playground/keyboard/bin/dygma flash underglow green 5 2>/dev/null || true

input=$(cat); msg=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.message // "Action required"' 2>/dev/null || echo 'Action required'); terminal-notifier -title 'Claude Code — Action Required' -message "$msg" -sound default 2>/dev/null || true

input=$(cat); tool=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_name' 2>/dev/null); if [ "$tool" = "AskUserQuestion" ]; then ~/playground/keyboard/bin/dygma flash underglow orange --force 2>/dev/null; else ~/playground/keyboard/bin/dygma breathe underglow yellow --force --keep-if-same 2>/dev/null; fi; true
